task_completion.description: Access the VistA database through the web browser.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser window is open displaying the VistA database interface or login screen.

task_completion.description: Review vital sign records across the patient population in VistA.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser shows patient lists, vital sign logs, or database queries indicating a systematic review of vital sign counts.

task_completion.description: Create the vitals_monitoring_report.txt file on the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window shows the creation or editing of a file named 'vitals_monitoring_report.txt' located in '/home/ga/Desktop/'.

task_completion.description: Include a ranked list of the top 5 patients with their full name, identifier, and vital sign count.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of the text file show exactly 5 patients ranked by a number (vital sign count), along with their names and IDs.

task_completion.description: Include the total number of vital sign entries found in the database.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file contains a specific number representing the total aggregate vital sign entries across the database.

task_completion.description: Include a brief clinical interpretation of what high vital sign frequency indicates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file contains a sentence or paragraph discussing the clinical meaning of high vital sign frequency (e.g., acuity, instability, over-documentation).

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser to access VistA as instructed, rather than using terminal scripts to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show active interaction with a web browser (e.g., clicking, scrolling, or searching within the VistA web interface).

integrity.description: The agent extracted data by actually viewing patient records or running queries, rather than hallucinating the results.
integrity.visual_evidence: The numbers and names in the final report correspond to data visible in the browser during the VistA database review phase.

integrity.description: The agent created the report file during the session rather than copying a pre-existing file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Visible typing, pasting, or echoing of the report contents into the text editor or terminal.
